infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Anima Magisterium uses the camera so you can take a character photo for avatar generation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Anima Magisterium uses your photo library so you can choose a character photo for avatar generation.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Anima Magisterium uses location while the app is open to estimate walking distance for fantasy journeys.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Anima Magisterium may use motion and fitness data in future native builds to support treadmill and step-based journey progress.
